name: Modular Adjustable Weight System
notes: Eli's main progressive strength equipment. Two standard dumbbells, kettlebell handle, or one large connected weight.

name: Fixed Dumbbells 3kg
notes: Christina's primary dumbbells. Eli uses for lateral raises and reverse flys only.

name: Adjustable Bench
notes: Cannot be used by both simultaneously. Coordinate bench exercises.

name: Speed Rope
notes: Eli primary. Do not suggest for Christina when dizzy, lightheaded, migraine, high pain, or high fatigue.

name: Yoga Mats
notes: Two mats available. No conflict — both users can use simultaneously.

name: Open Workout Space
notes: Shared open space. No conflict. Farmer carries do not create a conflict.
